commits.message:
feat(site): 3-column live playground with CodeMirror + xterm.js

Replace scrolling gallery with interactive playground layout:
- Column 1: Component selector sidebar
- Column 2: CodeMirror 6 editor with JSX, populates on selection
- Column 3: xterm.js terminal, re-renders live on every edit

Uses sucrase for in-browser JSX→JS transformation and eval with
all rich-js-ink components in scope. 300ms debounced re-render.
